name: American Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayonnaise, Speisequark, vinegar, and tomato ketchup in a bowl. Mix well with an egg beater.
2. Grind the garlic clove into a paste or press it through a garlic press. Add to the dressing and mix thoroughly.
3. Wash and dry the herbs with kitchen paper. Chives should be finely chopped. Parsley and thyme leaves should be removed and finely chopped.
4. Fold the herbs into the dressing and season generously with salt, pepper, Tabasco, Cognac, or brandy. Taste and adjust seasoning.
This American Dressing pairs well with endive and arugula salad, as well as romaine, chicory, and iceberg salads. It also serves well as a vegetable dip, such as with carrots, asparagus, fennel, and broccoli rabe.
